name: Bits o' Chocolate Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 15 x 10 x 1-inch jelly roll pan. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, bananas, butter, eggs, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and vanilla extract. Beat on low speed, scraping the bowl often, for 2 to 3 minutes until well mixed. Stir in the chocolate chips. Spread in the prepared pan. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
For the frosting: In a mixing bowl, combine powdered sugar, butter, milk, and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed, scraping the bowl often, until light and fluffy. Frost the bars. Sprinkle shaved chocolate over the top. Cut into bars.
